description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine seq_branch_data_3, and is implemented by a call to seq_branch_data_3. Use this API to modify the zero sequence data of an existing non-transformer branch in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Zero Sequence Non-Transformer Branch Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = seq_branch_data(ibus, jbus, ckt, realar)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus number of from bus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: Bus number of to bus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of seven elements specifying (defaulted data items are unchanged). (input).

realar.description: BCHZ, zero sequence total line charging.
GI, zero sequence active line shunt at bus IBUS end.
BI, zero sequence reactive line shunt at bus IBUS end.
GJ, zero sequence active line shunt at bus JBUS end.
BJ, zero sequence reactive line shunt at bus JBUS end.

error_codes.description: circuit identifier is more than two characters.
circuit identifier may not start with &
branch exists but it is a two-winding transformer.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - branch is treated as a zero impedance line but its zero sequence impedance is non-zero.
